_comment: System tiles de TI4. Campo 'set': base/pok/thundersEdge. Campo 'tileColor': green (home systems), blue (con planetas), red (anomalías/vacíos), fracture (La Fractura). Fuente: PDF Player Components (oficial) para Base+PoK+Thunder's Edge. Valores de home systems de nuevas facciones (Deepwrought, Firmament, Obscured) tomados de wiki ya que no están en el PDF subido. Habilidades de planetas legendarios de Thunder's Edge marcadas como pendientes de confirmar.

specialPlanets.name: Mirage

legendaryAbility.name: Mirage Flight Academy
legendaryAbility.effect: EXHAUST: Place up to 2 fighters from your reinforcements in any system that contains 1 or more of your ships.

specialPlanets.notes: Aparece al resolver la carta de exploración Frontier 'Mirage'. Se coloca el token de planeta en ese sistema sin planetas.

tiles.name: Creuss Gate
tiles.notes: Puerta de entrada al sistema home de Creuss.

tiles.name: Keleres
tiles.notes: El home system de Keleres varía según la subfacción elegida (Argent, Xxcha, o Mentak). Se asigna al inicio de la partida.

legendaryAbility.name: The Atrament
legendaryAbility.effect: EXHAUST: Place 2 infantry from your reinforcements on any planet you control.

legendaryAbility.name: Imperial Arms Vault
legendaryAbility.effect: EXHAUST: Place 1 mech from your reinforcements on any planet you control, or draw 1 action card.

tiles.name: Muaat Supernova
tiles.notes: Tile especial para la habilidad del Héroe de Muaat (Stellar Transformer). No entra al tablero durante el setup normal.

tiles.name: Wormhole Nexus

legendaryAbility.name: Exterrix Headquarters
legendaryAbility.effect: EXHAUST: Gain 2 trade goods, or convert all of your commodities to trade goods.

tiles.notes: Off-map. Empieza inactivo (solo gamma). Se gira a activo (alpha+beta+gamma) cuando un jugador mueve/coloca unidades en él por primera vez.

tiles.name: Hyperlane A
tiles.notes: Tile de hyperlane. Conexiones exactas entre bordes pendientes de confirmar contra la imagen real del tile — no se adivinan. tileColor es null porque las hyperlanes no participan del mazo azul/rojo, se colocan directo según el layout.

legendaryAbility.name: 4X41D Hyperion VI
legendaryAbility.effect: You may exhaust this card when you pass to draw 1 action card and gain 1 command token.

tiles.name: The Sorrow / Crimson rebellion gate system
tiles.notes: Puerta de entrada al sistema home de Crimson rebellion.

legendaryAbility.name: Maxis Central Control
legendaryAbility.effect: You may exhaust this card when you pass to gain control of a non-home, non-legendary planet that contains no units and has no attachments.

legendaryAbility.name: Dok 'N Pic's Salvage Yard
legendaryAbility.effect: You may exhaust this card when you pass to place 1 action card from the discard pile faceup on this card; you can purge cards on this card to play them as if they were in your hand.

legendaryAbility.name: The Acropolis
legendaryAbility.effect: You may exhaust this card at the end of your turn to ready another component that isn't a strategy card.

legendaryAbility.name: Ionian Fuel Refinery
legendaryAbility.effect: You may exhaust this card after you activate a system to apply +1 to the move value of 1 of your ships during this tactical action.

legendaryAbility.name: The Galactic Council
legendaryAbility.effect: You may exhaust this card and discard 1 secret objective at the end of your turn to draw 1 secret objective.

legendaryAbility.name: Aeurex Mechanica
legendaryAbility.effect: You may exhaust this card when you pass to place 1 ship that matches a unit upgrade technology you own from your reinforcements into a system that contains your ships.

tiles.name: The Watchtower / Gravity Rift / Asteroid Field
Fracture A

planets.name: Cocytus
specialRules: When you gain control of this planet, gain 1 relic.

tiles.notes: Tile ubicaddo a la izquierda superior del mapa con 2 hexagonos. egress + Planeta de La Fractura. Guardado por 2 cruceros y 2 infantería neutrales.

tiles.name: Fracture B

planets.name: Lethe
specialRules: When you gain control of this planet, gain 1 relic.

planets.name: Plegethon
specialRules: When you gain control of this planet, gain 1 relic.

tiles.notes: Tile ubicaddo a la derecha superior del mapa con 2 hexagonos. egress + Dos planetas en un tile de La Fractura. Guardados por 1 carrier, 4 fighters y 2 infantería neutrales.

tiles.name: Fracture C

planets.name: Styx

legendaryAbility.name: A Song Like Marrow
legendaryAbility.effect: When you gain this card, gain 1 victory point. When you lose this card, lose 1 victory point.

specialRules: When you gain control of this planet, gain 1 relic.

tiles.notes: Tile ubicao en el centro superior del mapa compuesto por 3 hex, dos empty + Planeta legendario de La Fractura. El más fuertemente custodiado: 1 destroyer, 2 dreadnoughts y 3 infantería neutrales.
